---
title: "Integration"
---

| Date | Topic | Reading | Resources |
| -- | -- | -- | -- |
| 11/19 | Explanatory frameworks | Embick & Poeppel (2014) | [Submit questions](https://www.menti.com/bldf9ra1coas)
| 11/24 | Researcher panel
| Thurs 11/26 | *No class (Thanksgiving)*|
| Tues 12/1  |Presentations | 
| Thurs 12/3  |Presentations | 
| Tues 12/8  |Presentations | 


::: {.callout-tip}
# Learning Goals: Integration
(To be added)
:::
